languages.text: "И впрямь ледяной мир, эттфатер". {n}Рычащий глас Ульфара бесцеремонно врывается в эфир.{/n} "Его вид напоминает мне о том, как славно вернуться домой после долгого отсутствия и разделить кубок доброго мьода с братьями. Того, кого не закалили ветра Фенриса, среди подобной стужи спасет только умело подобранное снаряжение. Иначе кровь в жилах застынет, слова вымолвить не успеешь".

"A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."
languages.original_text: "И впрямь ледяной мир, эттфатер". {n}Рычащий глас Ульфара бесцеремонно врывается в эфир.{/n} "Его вид напоминает мне о том, как славно вернуться домой после долгого отсутствия и разделить кубок доброго мьода с братьями. Того, кого не закалили ветра Фенриса, среди подобной стужи спасет только умело подобранное снаряжение. Иначе кровь в жилах застынет, слова вымолвить не успеешь".

For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

"A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

languages.text: “一个真正的冰封世界，狼领。”{n}乌尔法粗粝的嗓音毫不客气地在音阵通讯中炸响。{/n}“看到它，就让我想起在漫长旅途之后重返故土、与兄弟们共饮一杯上好蜜酒的荣耀时刻。对于那些未经芬里斯寒风锤炼的人来说，唯有精心挑选的装备才能助他们在如此酷寒中保全性命。否则，你甚至来不及开口，血液就会在血管里冻结。”
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: “一个真正的冰封世界，狼领。”{n}乌尔法粗粝的嗓音毫不客气地在音阵通讯中炸响。{/n}“看到它，就让我想起在漫长旅途之后重返故土、与兄弟们共饮一杯上好蜜酒的荣耀时刻。对于那些未经芬里斯寒风锤炼的人来说，唯有精心挑选的装备才能助他们在如此酷寒中保全性命。否则，你甚至来不及开口，血液就会在血管里冻结。”

languages.text: «Es un mundo gélido, Aett-Vater». {n}La estruendosa voz de Ulfar resuena a través del voco.{/n} «Me recuerda a los gloriosos regresos a mi hogar tras un largo viaje, cuando compartía un buen cáliz de mjod junto a mis hermanos. Aquellos que se han criado lejos de los fuertes vientos de Fenrir necesitarán un equipo muy específico para sobrevivir a las temperaturas. Si no, su sangre se congelará antes de que pueda siquiera abrir la boca».
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: «Es un mundo gélido, Aett-Vater». {n}La estruendosa voz de Ulfar resuena a través del voco.{/n} «Me recuerda a los gloriosos regresos a mi hogar tras un largo viaje, cuando compartía un buen cáliz de mjod junto a mis hermanos. Aquellos que se han criado lejos de los fuertes vientos de Fenrir necesitarán un equipo muy específico para sobrevivir a las temperaturas. Si no, su sangre se congelará antes de que pueda siquiera abrir la boca».

languages.text: « Un monde pris dans la glace, aett-vater. {n}La voix grondante d'Ulfar résonne de façon abrupte dans le vox.{/n} Cette vue me rappelle à quel point il peut être grandiose de rentrer chez soi après une longue absence et de partager une bonne chopine de mjod avec mes frères. Quand on n'a pas été endurci par les vents de Fenris, seul un équipement soigneusement choisi peut vous sauver d'un froid pareil. Sans ça, votre sang se glace dans vos veines avant même que vous ne puissiez prononcer le moindre mot. »
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: « Un monde pris dans la glace, aett-vater. {n}La voix grondante d'Ulfar résonne de façon abrupte dans le vox.{/n} Cette vue me rappelle à quel point il peut être grandiose de rentrer chez soi après une longue absence et de partager une bonne chopine de mjod avec mes frères. Quand on n'a pas été endurci par les vents de Fenris, seul un équipement soigneusement choisi peut vous sauver d'un froid pareil. Sans ça, votre sang se glace dans vos veines avant même que vous ne puissiez prononcer le moindre mot. »

languages.text: "Gerçek bir buz dünyası bu Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar'ın hırlayan sesi, vokstan patavatsızca patlıyor.{/n} "Bunun görüntüsü bana, uzun bir yokluğun ardından eve dönmenin ve kardeşlerimle bir kadeh iyi mjod paylaşmanın ne kadar şanlı olduğunu hatırlatıyor. Fenris rüzgârlarının çetinleştirmekleri, böylesine bir soğukta ancak ustaca seçilmiş ekipmanlar sayesinde sağ kalabilir. Onlarsız daha tek kelime edemeden kan, damarlarınızda donar."
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek bir buz dünyası bu Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar'ın hırlayan sesi, vokstan patavatsızca patlıyor.{/n} "Bunun görüntüsü bana, uzun bir yokluğun ardından eve dönmenin ve kardeşlerimle bir kadeh iyi mjod paylaşmanın ne kadar şanlı olduğunu hatırlatıyor. Fenris rüzgârlarının çetinleştirmekleri, böylesine bir soğukta ancak ustaca seçilmiş ekipmanlar sayesinde sağ kalabilir. Onlarsız daha tek kelime edemeden kan, damarlarınızda donar."

languages.text: "Eine wahrlich eisige Welt, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfars knurrende Stimme übertönt das Vox.{/n} "Der Anblick erinnert mich daran, wie ruhmreich es ist, von einer langen Reise nach Hause zurückzukehren und mit meinen Brüdern einen Krug guten Mjod zu trinken. Wer nicht von den Winden auf Fenris gestählt wurde, braucht eine sorgsam gewählte Ausrüstung, um in einer solchen Kälte zu überleben. Ohne sie erstarrt das Blut in Euren Adern, ehe Ihr auch nur ein Wort sagen könnt."
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: "Eine wahrlich eisige Welt, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfars knurrende Stimme übertönt das Vox.{/n} "Der Anblick erinnert mich daran, wie ruhmreich es ist, von einer langen Reise nach Hause zurückzukehren und mit meinen Brüdern einen Krug guten Mjod zu trinken. Wer nicht von den Winden auf Fenris gestählt wurde, braucht eine sorgsam gewählte Ausrüstung, um in einer solchen Kälte zu überleben. Ohne sie erstarrt das Blut in Euren Adern, ehe Ihr auch nur ein Wort sagen könnt."

languages.text: 「本当に氷の世界だ、アエト・ヴァター。」{n}ウルファルの唸り声は、突然、ボイスチャットに響き渡る。{/n}「その光景を見るたびに、長い旅の後に故郷に帰り、兄弟たちと良いミオードを酌み交わすことの素晴らしさを思い出す。フェンリスの風で鍛えられていない者には、このような寒さの中、巧みに選ばれた装備しか救いにならない。装備がないと、言葉を発する前に血が凍り付く」
languages.original_text: "A truly ice world, Aett-Vater." {n}Ulfar's growling voice bursts unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "The sight of it reminds me of how glorious it is to return home after a long absence and share a goblet of good mjod with my brothers. For one who has not been hardened by the winds of Fenris, only skilfully chosen equipment will save them in the midst of such cold. Without it, the blood will freeze in your veins before you can utter a word."

traits.locale_text: 「本当に氷の世界だ、アエト・ヴァター。」{n}ウルファルの唸り声は、突然、ボイスチャットに響き渡る。{n}「その光景を見るたびに、長い旅の後に故郷に帰り、兄弟たちと良いミオードを酌み交わすことの素晴らしさを思い出す。フェンリスの風で鍛えられていない者には、このような寒さの中、巧みに選ばれた装備しか救いにならない。装備がないと、言葉を発する前に血が凍り付く。」
